title: Conference
description: Places the caller into a multi-party conference room. Multiple callers in the same named conference can speak to each other. Supports features like muting, recording, waiting rooms, and participant limits.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

name.description: The name of the conference room. All callers joining the same named conference are connected together.

beep.description: If true, play a beep when participants join or leave.

memberTag.description: A tag to identify this participant. Can be used to target specific members for actions like muting or whispering.

speakOnlyTo.description: If set, this participant's audio is only heard by the member with the specified memberTag. Creates a private whisper channel.

startConferenceOnEnter.description: If true (default), the conference starts when this participant joins. If false, this participant waits silently until a participant with startConferenceOnEnter=true joins.

endConferenceOnExit.description: If true, the conference ends for all participants when this participant leaves.

endConferenceDuration.description: Maximum duration of the conference in seconds.

maxParticipants.description: Maximum number of participants allowed in the conference.

joinMuted.description: If true, this participant joins the conference muted.

actionHook.description: A webhook invoked when this participant leaves the conference.

waitHook.description: A webhook invoked while this participant is waiting for the conference to start. Should return verbs to play (e.g. hold music).

statusEvents.description: List of conference events to receive via the statusHook.

statusHook.description: A webhook to receive conference status events (joins, leaves, etc.).

enterHook.description: A webhook invoked when this participant first enters the conference.

listen.description: Audio streaming configuration for the conference.

distributeDtmf.description: If true, DTMF events from this participant are distributed to all other participants.
